The gap between
what was contracted
and what was delivered â€” closed.

Infrastructure projects fail quietly â€” one unverified layer, one disputed inspection, one untracked breakdown at a time. Cognecto makes every field event visible, verifiable, and actionable before it becomes a cost.

Roads & Highways
Live on national highways in 7 days. No data science project required.

Pre-trained models for compaction, defect classification, and progress tracking. Drop Boson sensors on the rollers, point cameras at the site â€” Cognecto does the rest. Any corridor, any country, in under a week.

Learn how â†’
Mining Operations
One platform. Every shift, every fleet, every site â€” in a single view.

From open-cut mines in Australia to highway corridors in India, Cortex gives every stakeholder â€” operator, site manager, CFO, Ministry â€” the exact view they need. One integration. No siloed reports. No spreadsheet archaeology.

Learn how â†’
HSE & Safety
Documentation that survives a government audit, a contractor dispute, or a parliamentary question.

Every observation is geo-tagged, timestamped, and structured to NRIDA, OMMAS, and DFI standards. When the audit comes â€” and it always comes â€” the evidence is already there. Built-in, not bolted-on.

Learn how â†’

The same physics-based AI that monitors a highway corridor in Uttar Pradesh monitors a mine haul road in Australia and a water pipeline in Odisha. One platform, pre-configured for each industry â€” no re-training, no rebuilding.

How it works

Three layers.
One intelligence.

Boson hears the machinery. Photon sees the site. Cortex turns every signal into a decision. Three purpose-built layers â€” one unified AI operating system for physical infrastructure.

01 Hear â€” Boson
02 See â€” Photon
03 Act â€” Cortex
IoT Sensing Â· Physics AI

Hear â€” Boson

Physics-based AI trained on the actual mechanics of compaction, material fatigue, and structural degradation. Boson counts every roller pass, verifies every equipment sequence, and flags deviation before the concrete sets.

Compaction pass counting
Asset health monitoring
Predictive maintenance
Cross-industry transfer learning
Explore Boson â†’
Vision AI Â· 24/7 Monitoring

See â€” Photon

Computer vision running 24/7 across every camera on every site â€” detecting PPE violations, no-go zone intrusions, smoke and fire events in real time. Photon doesn't review footage after an incident. It prevents the incident.

PPE compliance monitoring
No-go zone intrusion detection
Fire & smoke detection
Poor visibility alerts
Explore Photon â†’
Dashboard Â· BOQ Â· Audit

Act â€” Cortex

The operating layer that turns Boson and Photon signals into decisions. BOQ verification triggers billing. Every output is structured, timestamped, and audit-ready â€” accessible from Ministry level down to a field supervisor's phone.

BOQ verification & billing triggers
Shift planning & fleet management
Geo-tagged audit trails
Role-based access â€” field to Ministry

Built for decision-makers

Two audiences.
One standard of proof.

A Ministry Secretary needs court-admissible evidence. A mining CFO needs production certainty. An infrastructure DFI needs ESG ground truth. The audience is different. The intelligence underneath is the same.

For Governments

The monitoring standard that makes public infrastructure audit-proof â€” by design.

For IAS officers, programme directors, and ministry leadership running infrastructure mandates under PMGSY, NHAI, state PWDs, and urban development schemes where accountability is non-negotiable.

  • Court-admissible, geo-tagged evidence for every inspection
  • NRIDA and OMMAS-compatible structured outputs
  • 7-day district activation â€” no IT procurement needed
  • Role-based access from field engineer to Secretary level
  • Make in India certified Â· government data protocols
Explore government solutions â†’
For Enterprise & Global

Investment-grade intelligence for operators who cannot afford ambiguity.

For DFIs, sovereign wealth funds, mining operators, EPC contractors, and global infrastructure developers deploying capital in markets where contractor accountability has historically been unverifiable â€” until now.

  • Continuous ESG ground-truth â€” not periodic self-reported data
  • Real-time contractor execution validation against contract terms
  • One integration, multi-country rollout from Australia to Africa
  • Export-grade compliance and audit certification
  • API-first architecture for enterprise system integration
Explore enterprise solutions â†’
The Hidden Cost of Doing Nothing

Manual inspection is not
the safe choice.
It is the expensive one.

SKIP

Five costs that compound silently when nothing is monitored
âœ—
Rework that was entirely preventable
One missed compaction failure on a highway corridor costs â‚¹40â€“80 lakh to fix after the surface is laid. Cognecto flags it before the next layer goes down â€” when correction costs nothing.
â‚¹40â€“80Lper incident
âœ—
Disputes that evidence would have ended immediately
Without timestamped, geo-tagged evidence, every quality dispute defaults to the contractor's version of events. Payment releases stall. Audits escalate. Cognecto makes every inspection court-ready by default.
monthsof delay
âœ—
Equipment failures that predictive data would have prevented
One unplanned HEMM breakdown cascades across an entire fleet â€” 4â€“8 hours of lost production, multiplied. Boson's predictive maintenance reduces unplanned downtime below 5% by detecting degradation before failure.
4â€“8 hrsfleet idle
âœ—
Safety events that real-time monitoring would have stopped
An industrial fatality shuts a project for 6â€“18 months. Criminal liability. Regulatory inquiry. Reputational damage. Beyond the human cost, it is a company-ending event. A PPE violation caught by Photon in real time costs nothing.
6â€“18moshutdown risk
âœ—
Infrastructure that fails before its design life â€” and is rebuilt at public cost
A PMGSY road built to 60% of spec fails in 3â€“4 years instead of 10. Reconstruction costs the same public budget 3â€“5Ã— the original contract value. The savings from monitoring are not marginal â€” they are structural.
3â€“5Ã—rebuild cost

Structural advantages Â· Not features

Four advantages
built over four years.
None transferable overnight.

Any cloud provider can launch an "infrastructure AI" module. None of them have four years of compaction physics models, 20,000 km of training data, patent-filed IP, and a structured event schema that becomes the audit standard for every project it touches.

â€” 01

Models trained on physics â€” not just pixels.

Most AI platforms retrain from scratch on every new asset class. Cognecto's models are built on the physics of degradation â€” compaction mechanics, material fatigue, corrosion chemistry, flow dynamics. When a highway model moves to a mine haul road, it does not start over. It transfers. That is not a feature. It is an architectural decision that took four years and cannot be shortcut.

â€” 02

A data moat that grows wider with every deployment.

Over 20,000 km of roads monitored. Millions of compaction-pass events. Defect libraries built from real failures in India, Australia, and East Africa. Every new deployment sharpens every existing model. No academic dataset, no cloud provider's synthetic training set, and no new entrant with six months of data can close this gap.

â€” 03

Patent-filed IP that cannot be commoditised.

Compaction-pass counting via GPS-IoT fusion. AI defect classification from field video. Multi-sensor infrastructure health scoring. All patent-filed. A cloud provider cannot add these as marketplace modules â€” they required years of domain-specific R&D at the intersection of civil engineering, physics, and machine learning.

â€” 04

The platform becomes the audit standard â€” not a vendor dependency.

Every Cognecto-monitored project produces a structured, queryable event history â€” chainage-referenced, timestamped, role-segmented. Governments use it for audits. Operators use it for billing. DFIs use it for ESG reporting. When the data becomes the official record of what happened on a project, the platform does not need to lock anyone in. No one walks away from their own audit trail.

The next move is yours

Every project that runs without
Cognecto is generating risk
instead of intelligence.

Governments use Cognecto to make infrastructure accountable. Operators use it to eliminate ambiguity. Investors use it to see what is actually happening on the ground. See it live on your asset class â€” in a 30-minute session.
